_meta.title: Dark Factory — Factory Map
_meta.subtitle: What we're building: every pipeline, its status, its gaps, and how it fits.
_meta.source: promote-wargame --list (track status) + docs/kdd/ (gaps) + docs/constellation-map.md (architecture). Curated snapshot v1 — hand-placed, true as of the date above; not auto-fed.

status_legend.label: Staged
status_legend.note: tickets written + ready, none shipped yet

status_legend.label: Unbuilt gap
status_legend.note: a core mechanism that does not work yet

tracks.name: Engine
tracks.purpose: The dispatch kernel — claim, reap, independent re-verify, worktrees, retry/settle, governors.
tracks.note: The most mature track. Hardened + proven this session: T1-16 durable ledger, T1-19 worktrees, T1-20 no-spin, T1-21 verify-in-worktree.
gaps: on-machine parallel uncertified — worktrees built (T1-19) but the pool=2 proof is still deferred

tracks.name: Ingestion
tracks.purpose: Harvest upstream artifacts → canonical skills in David's voice, with full provenance. The original charter.
tracks.note: PROVEN this session: artifact #1 (review-dimensional) harvested, drafted, inspected, and RATIFIED. canonical/ was empty 7 weeks; now holds 1.
gaps: HITL/ratification apply doesn't complete in-engine (had to be hand-finished)
style-check has a coherence gap — checks form, not description↔body coherence

tracks.name: Producer / BA
tracks.purpose: The BA agent + a universal activity registry — turns real activity into tickets and briefings.
tracks.note: Barely started. 11 off-registry repos are invisible to the inventory; the producer that would feed the factory doesn't exist yet.

tracks.name: Watchtower
tracks.purpose: The web control-plane — status.py → HTTP API → a UI you can watch the factory from.
tracks.note: Scaffold exists (AppyStack, 2026-06-11) but was never installed/deployed. This is where the visibility gap gets its permanent home.

tracks.name: Constellation
tracks.purpose: The micro-apps in orbit — sentinel, AngelEye, AppyRadar, omi-fetch — plus name-collision hygiene.
tracks.note: None shipped. Sentinel is blind to Roamy; the 'a'→'e' migration is pending; AngelEye needs revival.
gaps: micro-apps not yet wired into the factory

tracks.name: Self-learning
tracks.purpose: The reflective-review engine — staleness scan, decision-lineage log, KDD structural gates.
tracks.note: The loop that would let the factory improve itself. KDD exists (via Lisa) but the automated review engine is unbuilt.

tracks.name: Doc-truth
tracks.purpose: Reconcile docs with shipped reality — strategy-doc status lines vs what's actually on disk.
tracks.note: Cheap, high-value hygiene. Several docs are known-stale (CLAUDE.md pointer, retired personas).

tracks.name: Voice / comms
tracks.purpose: Audio-out — done/failed/needs-you chimes, a sound vocabulary, a Samantha Q&A front door.
tracks.note: The reap chime is LIVE (consumer.py). The richer sound vocabulary + Samantha are staged.
gaps: Switchboard comms bus is DOWN on both machines

tracks.name: Fleet
tracks.purpose: Cross-machine work — Roamy as a Swagger worker over Tailscale, cross-machine HALT broadcast.
tracks.note: Cross-machine delegation proven live during authoring; the war game re-runs it against a real ticket. This is the safe form of parallelism (isolated repos).

architecture.note: The factory is a STACK, not a list (docs/constellation-map.md). Surfaces mount on the host; they visualise slices of data produced below.

layers.name: HOST — KBDE / KyberAgent
layers.role: Where every surface mounts as an extension across the seam.

layers.name: SURFACES — a slice of data + a way to see it
layers.role: KBDE-extension candidates. Chosen by data type: list / search / detail / dashboard.

layers.name: DATA — sources → data-plane → artifacts
layers.role: The 'great data cluster' the factory runs on.

components.name: Inventory / registries
components.note: the first data source — what apps exist, do they run

components.name: Blackboard MCP
components.note: shared K/V; dynamic workflows share data

components.name: Switchboard
components.note: headless SSE+MCP data plane — DOWN both machines

gaps_board.title: HITL / ratification pipeline unbuilt
gaps_board.detail: A designed decision-pause is misread as a wedged worker; the multi-step ratification apply never completes in a worker window. Artifact #1 had to be ratified by hand.

gaps_board.title: Dispatched workers skip final bookkeeping
gaps_board.detail: Workers finish the real work but drop the trailing bookkeeping. Recurred 3× — now a promoted PATTERN. Capture completion externally, never via the worker's self-report.

gaps_board.title: style-check has a coherence gap
gaps_board.detail: Checks form + provenance, not whether a skill's description matches what its body does. skill-creator caught a defect ours can't see; the two are complementary.

gaps_board.title: On-machine parallel uncertified
gaps_board.detail: Worktree isolation is built (T1-19) and held under a real pool=2 run, but the attended certification of parallel product work is still deferred.

gaps_board.title: Comms bus (Switchboard) down
gaps_board.detail: The headless SSE+MCP data plane is dark on both machines — event-driven watching falls back to timer-polling / chime.

next: Out of the moratorium (ADR-0045): with the whole factory now visible, choose the next PIPELINE — not '1,100 skills' by default. Candidates the map surfaces: harden HITL (unblocks ratification at scale), stand up Watchtower (permanent visibility), or build the Producer (T2, so the factory feeds itself).
